elements.original_description: A small stack of coins on a pure white background, arranged neatly in a pyramid shape. The coins are shiny and metallic, with a slight golden tint. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon. A small, neat pyramid-shaped stack of shiny, metallic coins with a slight golden tint on a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients. Cinematic lighting with a soft, hopeful mood. High resolution, sharp focus. Absolutely no text, letters, numbers, or watermarks.
